description: HVHZ attribute overlay applies for a Miami-Dade FIPS location
assertions: fl-hvhz is returned as applicable with its source citation
decided-by basis names the matched attribute rule (county FIPS)
first line is the verbatim advisory boundary

description: HVHZ does not apply outside Miami-Dade/Broward
SB 4D milestone needs stories + ownership + CO age; unknown facts are null-and-flagged, not assumed
assertions: SB 4D is not reported as applicable when required facts are unknown
the missing facts (stories, ownership, CO age) are null-and-flagged

description: A geometry overlay needing a live boundary while jurisdictional_overlay_live is off returns a config gap and makes no network call
assertions: returns a config gap pointing to cached/manual data

description: jurisdictional_overlay disabled -> reports the capability is off rather than answering
